title: dayia glutinosa
intro: Dayia glutinosa, also known as the Dayia plant or Glutinous Dayia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dayia glutinosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Dayia glutinosa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to various parts of the body.
